api_token.description: RepairShopr API token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: RepairShopr API base URL, e.g. https://<subdomain>.repairshopr.com/api/v1. This bundle requires the full base URL directly (see docs.md Known limits: legacy's subdomain-only derivation is not modeled, since the engine's default-materialization mechanism only supports a fixed literal default, not one derived from another config value).

created_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records created at or after this value.

updated_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records updated at or after this value.

query.description: Optional free-text search query passed through to RepairShopr's list endpoints.
